caption: In the video, a presenter stands in front of a projection screen displaying an image labeled "data as Taylorism," which shows a historical photograph of a worker operating machinery. The presenter, dressed in a black blazer over a white shirt, holds a tablet and gestures with her right hand while speaking. An audience member wearing a green beanie is seated in the foreground, attentively watching the presentation. The setting appears to be a professional or academic environment, likely a lecture or seminar, where the presenter is discussing concepts related to data and its historical context in industrial processes. The atmosphere suggests an engaging and informative session.
